ValidationRule.description:
If a stage is moving backwards, it can go to any previous stage. The validation only applies when moving forwards.
**Deactivated due to lack of usage. We only create the "Wolves" Opp for BI to send the data to the relevant Contact. The VR blocks Yael**
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Wolves", (CASE( StageName , "Not Relevant",1, "Cold Opportunity",1, "Prospecting",2, "NDA",3, "Evaluation",4, "Mobile - Negotiations",5, "Desktop - UFF Tech call",5, "IO",6, "Mobile - SDK Implementation",7, "Desktop - UFF Development",7, "QA",8,0) > (CASE(PRIORVALUE(StageName) , "Not Relevant",1, "Cold Opportunity",1, "Prospecting",2, "NDA",3, "Evaluation",4, "Mobile - Negotiations",5, "Desktop - UFF Tech call",5, "IO",6, "Mobile - SDK Implementation",7, "Desktop - UFF Development",7, "QA",8,0)) + 1)) && NOT($Profile.Id='00eb0000000oBvcAAE')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can go forward only to the next Stage
